$meta.usedBy: Fallback manual reconciliation for invoices where transaction_reference could not be supplied at creation (unknown PSP, missing payment id, etc.). Requires the caller to already know the Pennylane transaction_id (obtained via GET /transactions).

transaction_id.description: ID of a Pennylane transaction (from the connected bank / PSP integration) to reconcile against this invoice.

notes: Distinct from transaction_reference on POST /customer_invoices: that is a hint the Pennylane backend uses to auto-match an inbound transaction. This endpoint instead takes a pre-existing Pennylane transaction_id. Use transaction_reference on invoice creation when possible — it is simpler and avoids a second request.
